posts.title: Allen Crow x LUNAI Project 💜
posts.content: Allen Crow x LUNAI Project 💜 Mirror reflection of Llane Crow, has found his own voice and is joining us on the DiffSinger engine! He can sing in 16 languages ​​and has 5 vocal modes. His voice provider is LOP-P, who also voiced Llane. https://lunaiproject.github.io/singers/allen_crow @everyone

posts.title: Allen Crow - MOON (Original Song)  🌖  Russian DiffSinger Release
posts.content: Allen Crow - MOON (Original Song) 🌖 Russian DiffSinger Release YouTube: https://youtu.be/zGYK9lijnNE

posts.title: Today is the birthday of Katyusha's voice provider, Kaido Ren ❤️‍🔥
posts.content: Today is the birthday of Katyusha's voice provider, Kaido Ren ❤️‍🔥 Thank you so much for letting us work with you! We hope that Katyusha will be able to convey her message to listeners and find her place here. If you're curious about what her live vocals sound like, you can listen to Kaido Ren's works here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6929E331A1BA2DA3 Illustration by shikeii

posts.title: Katyusha x LUNAI Project 🦋
posts.content: Katyusha x LUNAI Project 🦋 With Maslenitsa and the beginning of spring, Katyusha, a new original singer, created by our project, joins us! Her voice is provided by Kaido Ren, a professional performer of Russian academic vocals. https://lunaiproject.github.io/singers/katyusha @everyone

posts.title: ⚡ OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.3 update has been released!
posts.content: ⚡ OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.3 update has been released! This is a test build. You may encounter bugs and crashes when using it Change log: - Singer Hub: a place where you can update or install DiffSinger voicebanks form trusted sources (currently Lunai, UFR and Brapa). In the future, we plan to make it possible to add your own singers here. It appears on the screen when you launch it, or you can open it in Tools -> Singer Hub... (pic. 1-3) - Solid playback line: this feature has been improved and is now in Preferences -> Playback (pic. 4) - TikTok recording mode: a test function that contains a preset for recording TikTok. It automatically detaches the piano roll in a separate window with a size of 9x16, change "Auto-Scroll" to "Stationary Cursor" with margin "0.5" and turn on "Solid playback line". To turn it on, go to View -> Piano Roll -> TikTok recording mode. To disable it and return your settings, disable it in the same place (pic. 5) - Improved smoothness of screen movement when "Stationary Cursor" is enabled. - .NET 8 was updated to .NET 10 (#1966) Hope all these innovations will make your experience in the program more convenient 💖 You can simply open your OpenUtau Lunai to receive the update notification, or install it here: https://github.com/keirokeer/OpenUtau-DiffSinger-Lunai/releases/tag/0.1.3.3

posts.title: On Valentine's Day, we introduce you to SAiFA, our newest member!
posts.content: On Valentine's Day, we introduce you to SAiFA, our newest member! She has 6 vocal modes and can sing in 16 languages ​​👀 And along with her, a Russian translation and cover of the song "SICK" by yuyoyuppe💉 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Blhl7uwPoT4 @everyone

posts.title: SAiFA is available now: https://lunaiproject.github.io/singers/saifa
posts.content: SAiFA is available now: https://lunaiproject.github.io/singers/saifa

posts.title: ⚡  OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.1 update has been released!
posts.content: ⚡ OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.1 update has been released! This is a test build. You may encounter bugs and crashes when using it This update includes a complete redesign of the phoneme panel for easy work with DiffSinger voicebanks! You can also hide phoneme language tags in Preferences -> DiffSinger You can simply open your OpenUtau Lunai to receive the update notification, or install it here: https://github.com/keirokeer/OpenUtau-DiffSinger-Lunai/releases/tag/0.1.3.1

posts.title: 📌  Let's talk about Monone's new design
posts.content:
📌  Let's talk about Monone's new design

This is a complete reinvention of the character, designed by rev_bmp. The main illustration by shikeii

She has her own lore from the Lunai universe, which tells how she can control levitation and many other interesting things that you will learn about later. Stay with us! 👀

posts.title: <a:Vi_notify:977103248202809435>  **OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.0 update has been released!**
posts.content:
<a:Vi_notify:977103248202809435>  **OpenUtau Lunai 0.1.3.0 update has been released!**

*This is a test build. You may encounter bugs and crashes when using it*

The build has been updated to the latest test features in original StAkira's OpenUTAU, and some unreleased pull requests have been added. The most interesting:

- **Piano roll** is now **attachable** to main window
- **Custom themes** *(not sure if they will work properly)*
- **Track expressions**
- DiffSinger **Refined Phonemizer**
- DiffSinger **Portuguese BRAPA Phonemizer**
- **Liaison support** to **French Millefeuille Phonemizer**
- Many **bugs** have been **fixed** (but others appeared)

You can simply open your OpenUtau Lunai to receive the update notification, or install it here:
https://github.com/keirokeer/OpenUtau-DiffSinger-Lunai/releases/tag/0.1.3.0

posts.title: Website Update
posts.content:
The LUNAI Project website has been completely redesigned with new features.

We've focused on creating a better user experience for all our visitors.

posts.title: Update v170 is out!
posts.content: The new update brings a lot of new features: improved quality, support for new languages, optimization, and a whole bunch more, which we'll be writing a separate post about later.
